entrypoint: set -euo pipefail; echo 'demo workload: verifying egress + seed round-trip'; curl -fsS --max-time 10 https://pypi.org/simple/ >/dev/null && echo 'ALLOWED host reached (pypi.org)'; if curl -fsS --max-time 10 https://example.com/ >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'UNEXPECTED: blocked host reached' >&2; exit 1; else echo 'BLOCKED host denied at proxy (example.com)'; fi; cd /workspace; printf 'written by the sandboxed workload at %s\n' "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" > demo-output.txt; git add demo-output.txt; git -c user.name=workload -c user.email=agent@agent-sandbox.local commit -m 'demo: workload write lands on review branch' >/dev/null; echo 'committed workload write for extraction'
